{{Quote|You hold a Sith creation, and it's very ancient.|[[Silri]] to [[Tyber Zann]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
The '''Carbonite Sith Army holocron''' was a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] that was stolen from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] by [[Tyber Zann]] and [[Urai Fen]]. Fen estimated its age to be about 4000 years old, placing its origin around the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. To further understand the device, they required a Force-user, seeking out the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Silri]]. Initially, Silri was only able to uncover ancient star charts. Zann was displeased, and had [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] return the holocron to [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]; Silri was furious. When the Consortium commanders came to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to gain the codes to the Emperor's vault, Silri and her [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] pet, [[Cuddles]], recovered the artifact. After Zann got to the vaults, Silri explored the device for herself and used it to find the [[Carbonite Sith Army]].

{{Tech-stub}}
